primary_review_question: Do all 330 files earn their boundaries and belong in the canonical story?

file_economy.score_meaning: Small-file boundaries are justified by strong local taxonomy and clear governance boundaries.

category_rows.notes: Justified when API, browser, route, and integration boundaries stay navigable.
Justified when command behavior and operator entry points stay isolated.
Justified when each module owns one runtime responsibility.
Justified when report rendering stays isolated from scoring and healing.
Monitor helper fragmentation and repeated one-method modules.
Justified when evaluator pieces remain independently testable.
Justified when scanning, extraction, evidence, and healing stay separable.
Justified when tests protect coherence governance and report contracts.
Justified when decomposition keeps agent work packets small and governable.
Justified only for wrappers, config, registry, boundary, or executable surfaces.
Monitor whether each single method keeps durable semantic weight.

readme_alignment.source_truth: projection-ready from current scan and story review

canonical_surface_map.legacy_or_alternate_surfaces: bin/taxonomy-report.js, bin/taxonomy-scan.js, bin/verify-scan-fixture.js, bin/verify-scan-validator.js, bin/verify-scan.js, bin/verify-scan.test.js
canonical_surface_map.relationship: canonical renderer with CLI and verification surfaces
canonical_surface_map.boundary_evidence: CLI and verification surfaces exercise scanner entry points; renderer remains canonical report owner.

canonical_surface_map.relationship: canonical sibling surface for run progress and summary reporting
canonical_surface_map.boundary_evidence: Swarm report owns taxonomy-healing batch observability; run report surfaces own generic run routing/progress views.
Obsolete story report entry points were retired; no alternate story-review surface remains.

canonical_surface_map.relationship: orchestration boundary distinct from direct anchor mutation utilities
canonical_surface_map.boundary_evidence: Heal-run owns governed lifecycle/reporting; taxonomy-heal and update-anchors are lower-level mutation utilities.

canonical_surface_map.relationship: worker-local reporting stack distinct from global observability
canonical_surface_map.boundary_evidence: Worker report modules own worker-local assembly/formatting/telemetry; global observability owns operator-level scan and swarm reports.

story_governance.overall_label: ✅ 100% earned | local taxonomy, filesystem story, README, file economy, and canonical story all clear

final_verdict:
The studio has achieved 100/100 local taxonomy tie-out: all scanned files have file anchors, all detected method anchors are represented, and no weak or missing taxonomy stories remain.

The current verdict is: local taxonomy is clean, filesystem boundaries align, README projection is governed, canonical boundaries are distinct, and the small-file decomposition is justified by strong evidence.

For this studio snapshot, local truth and whole-story truth now agree.

The standing doctrine remains: local truth is not automatically whole truth. Future files must continue to earn canonical ownership and boundary justification before the codebase can keep the green badge.
